如果有什么委托，请联系我的中间人，黑市的管理者大胡子，又或者兄弟会的神父。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o48348a2a67a2553897a0ce626fe9da83~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"用户93778794","author_id":"","book_id":"7315269249440697406","book_name":"赛博朋克传奇雇佣兵","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#082020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3663人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":873,"name":"赛博朋克","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=873&name=赛博朋克&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7315269253156848190","read_count":"3663","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"4040511"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.1","serial_count":"1698","tags":"科幻末世,赛博朋克","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o48348a2a67a2553897a0ce626fe9da83~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779286651&x-signature=WLMY%2FAPgoEZUd%2BBkgp7OJWZQO%2FI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2984497051871927","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"214"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032122173122FA4F06522DD6D8676B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":16273,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":9989},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7516834351626404632","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常好的书。以下均为主观评价，不喜勿喷。
在赛博朋克背景下穿插修炼、神话、多元宇宙等多种元素，共同构建了一个庞大、新奇且完善的世界观，并随着故事的发展层层展开。
剧情紧凑节奏合理，看一个小人物为了身世之谜、朋友、家人不断卷入命运的漩涡之中，扑腾翻滚，在爱与恶(wu)下逐渐成长。
人物形象刻画丰满，在与主线紧密相关的人物上有独立篇章或在他人口中或剧情发展中穿插其背景故事。文中角色没有真正的黑与白之分，是五颜六色的灰，各自为了自身的底线与立场而合作、摩擦或者冲突。
努力追更中。","text_exts":[{"e":26,"s":22,"text":"赛博朋克","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%B5%9B%E5%8D%9A%E6%9C%8B%E5%85%8B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774102651D6D8676B%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227516834351626404632%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227315269249440697406%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%B5%9B%E5%8D%9A%E6%9C%8B%E5%85%8B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1750157250,"group_id":"7315269249440697406","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N80VfVaUW6Dq4GLBL9puMKprrC9MnlA2wKOaJstbZ0uq","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/07c2ef829fd54fa28a0a84771c25af51~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776615131&x-signature=htcQDWlk0ncdPdcutoxv4snWcao%3D","user_id":"2516149362505710","user_name":"✚咖啡重度依赖✚"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2516149362505710","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7315269249440697406","book_info":{"abstract":"你好，朋友。
